basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Program Specialist, Sr Project Scientist and More Post
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Program Specialist, Technical cum Knowledge Management Specialist, Principal Project Scientist, Sr. Project Scientist
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has published the Project Appointment Notification 2026 on the official website of IIT Delhi. A total of 7 Project Appointment positions are to be filled through this recruitment drive. Candidates holding a Post-Graduation Degree with First Class or equivalent in the relevant discipline are eligible to apply for these positions. The age limit has not been specified in the official notification. Interested candidates can submit their applications through email on or before 02 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned for the posts. Age relaxation: 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to SC/ST candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduation Degree with 1st class or equivalent in relevant fields. Specific requirements vary by post.
qualification.details: Program Specialist: Post-graduation Degree with 1st class or equivalent in Food and Nutrition/Public Health/ Food Science & Technology/ any other relevant fields. At least 10 years' experience in the field of Food Science/ Public Health/ Food Nutrition after Post Graduation Degree. Technical cum Knowledge Management Specialist: Post-graduation with 1st class or equivalent in Food Nutrition/ Food Technology/ Mass Communication/ Public Health/ any other relevant fields. Principal Project Scientist (Biotechnology/Life Science): Ph.D. Degree in Biotechnology/ Life Science/ Molecular biology/ any other relevant fields or Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology/ Life Science/ Molecular biology/ relevant fields along with at least 6 years of research experience. At least 6 years of research experience. Principal Project Scientist (Food Process Engineering): Ph.D. Degree with 1st class or equivalent in Food Process Engineering/ Food Science & Technology/ Biochemical Engineering/ Agricultural Engineering/ any other relevant fields or Post Graduate Degree in Food Process Engineering/ Food Science & Technology/Biochemical Engineering / Agricultural Engineering/relevant fields with 6 years' experience. 6 years' experience. Sr. Project Scientist: M Tech/ MS(R) Degree with 1st class or equivalent in Food Process Engineering/Food Science & Technology/ Biochemical Engineering/ Food & Nutrition or any other relevant fields or B Tech/MSc/Post Graduate in Food Process Engineering/ Food Science & Technology/ Biochemical Engineering/ Food & Nutrition or relevant fields (1st class or equivalent) with at least 3 years' experience. At least 3 years' experience.

salary_details.details: Program Specialist: Rs.2,10,000/- p.m. (consolidated) Technical cum Knowledge Management Specialist: Rs.1,50,000/- p.m. (consolidated) Principal Project Scientist: Rs.1,20,000/- p.m. (consolidated) Sr. Project Scientist: Rs.75,000/- p.m. (consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Program Specialist: Post-graduation Degree with 1st class or equivalent in Food and Nutrition/Public Health/ Food Science & Technology/ any other relevant fields. At least 10 years' experience in the field of Food Science/ Public Health/ Food Nutrition after Post Graduation Degree. Technical cum Knowledge Management Specialist: Post-graduation with 1st class or equivalent in Food Nutrition/ Food Technology/ Mass Communication/ Public Health/ any other relevant fields. Principal Project Scientist (Biotechnology/Life Science): Ph.D. Degree in Biotechnology/ Life Science/ Molecular biology/ any other relevant fields or Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology/ Life Science/ Molecular biology/ relevant fields along with at least 6 years of research experience. At least 6 years of research experience. Principal Project Scientist (Food Process Engineering): Ph.D. Degree with 1st class or equivalent in Food Process Engineering/ Food Science & Technology/ Biochemical Engineering/ Agricultural Engineering/ any other relevant fields or Post Graduate Degree in Food Process Engineering/ Food Science & Technology/Biochemical Engineering / Agricultural Engineering/relevant fields with 6 years' experience. 6 years' experience. Sr. Project Scientist: M Tech/ MS(R) Degree with 1st class or equivalent in Food Process Engineering/Food Science & Technology/ Biochemical Engineering/ Food & Nutrition or any other relevant fields or B Tech/MSc/Post Graduate in Food Process Engineering/ Food Science & Technology/ Biochemical Engineering/ Food & Nutrition or relevant fields (1st class or equivalent) with at least 3 years' experience. At least 3 years' experience.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned for the posts. Age relaxation: 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to SC/ST candidates.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Program Specialist: Rs.2,10,000/- p.m. (consolidated) Technical cum Knowledge Management Specialist: Rs.1,50,000/- p.m. (consolidated) Principal Project Scientist: Rs.1,20,000/- p.m. (consolidated) Sr. Project Scientist: Rs.75,000/- p.m. (consolidated)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Project Appointment posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Delhi Project Appointment posts is 02-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Appointment at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for various Project Appointment positions at the Indian Institute of Technology Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for most of these project-based roles is a Post-graduation Degree with 1st class or equivalent in relevant fields. Specific requirements vary by post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application process for IIT Delhi Project Appointment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to download the application form from the IRD website, fill it completely, and send it via email to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the Project Appointment posts at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The consolidated pay ranges from Rs. 75,000/- p.m. to Rs. 2,10,000/- p.m., depending on the specific post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for these positions?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification released by IIT Delhi for these project-based recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Appointment roles?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of candidates based on their applications, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of IIT Delhi for recruitment-related information?
faq.answer: The official website for recruitment information, specifically for IRD projects, is http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: While specific age limits are not detailed, the notification mentions a 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to SC/ST candidates.
